title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama’s REST API, published to npm as ‘ollama’.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, available on PyPI as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration allowing Ollama models to be used as LLM or Chat components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with user management, model pulls, and RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java SDK for Ollama exposing generate, chat, embeddings, and model management APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s REST endpoints with idiomatic Ruby syntax.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API for quick chatting and model ops from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s place with inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & persistent storage options.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) maintained in the main repo with examples.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# client for Ollama with .NET 6+ support and both sync/async APIs.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service for CI pipelines requiring local LLMs.

title: ollama-rag-stack
summary: Starter template combining Ollama, Chroma, LangChain & Streamlit for private RAG apps.
